text:
User: I also need a tenex-edge mgmt session list that will show me all sessions, allow me to toggle on/off some of them, navigate up/down, fuzzy search, and kill sessions [...] - Delete `agents` and top-level `tui` completely—no aliases. [...] For `mgmt session list`, move and extend the existing Ratatui implementation. It already has navigation, details, PTY attachment, panes, refresh, and killing. Add:

- `/` fuzzy search across handle, title, activity, workspace/channel, host, cwd, and transport.
- `Space` toggle selection.
- `a` toggle all visible search results.
- `↑/↓` and `j/k` navigation.
- `K` confirm and kill the selected sessions—or the current row when none are selected.
- Exact selected count and handles in the confirmation.
- Workspace/channel grouping with a details pane.
- One canonical daemon query joining session records, memberships, lifecycle, and endpoints. The current TUI’s `agents_list_sessions` + `pty_status` client merge cannot reliably represent all sessions. [...] - `tenex-edge mgmt session list`
- Fuzzy search with `/`
- `↑/↓` and `j/k` navigation
- `Space` selection, `a` select visible, `u` clear
- Exact-ID batch killing with double-`K` confirmation
- PTY attach, panes, details, and refresh preserved [...] - Old top-level `tenex-edge tui` completely removed
